plugins.name: commercial-legal
plugins.description: 商事合同法务：Vendor, customer, SaaS, NDA, renewal, escalation, and stakeholder-summary workflows adapted to PRC contract, data, IP, and dispute-resolution practice.

plugins.name: privacy-legal
plugins.description: 数据合规与个人信息保护：PIPL, Data Security Law, Cybersecurity Law, PIAs/PIPIA, DPA, personal-information rights requests, cross-border data transfer, and policy monitoring.

plugins.name: product-legal
plugins.description: 产品合规法务：Product launch, feature-risk, advertising claims, consumer protection, e-commerce, content, cybersecurity, data, and AI compliance triage for Mainland China.

plugins.name: corporate-legal
plugins.description: 公司与交易法务：M&A diligence, closing checklists, corporate resolutions, board/shareholder minutes, entity compliance, and integration workflows adapted to PRC company and transaction practice.

plugins.name: employment-legal
plugins.description: 劳动用工法务：Hiring, termination, worker-classification, leave, handbook, internal-investigation, and employment-expansion workflows adapted to PRC labor law and local practice.

plugins.name: regulatory-legal
plugins.description: 监管合规法务：China regulatory feed monitoring, public-consultation tracking, policy gap analysis, policy redrafts, and gap tracking across PRC regulators.

plugins.name: ai-governance-legal
plugins.description: AI 治理法务：AI use-case triage, AI impact assessments, vendor AI review, algorithm/generative-AI compliance, and AI policy monitoring for Mainland China.

plugins.name: litigation-legal
plugins.description: 争议解决法务：Litigation/arbitration matter management, chronologies, evidence preservation, claim charts, demand letters, legal holds, counsel status, and brief drafting adapted to PRC civil procedure and arbitration practice.

plugins.name: law-student
plugins.description: 中国法学习：Legal study, case briefing, Socratic drills, legal writing, outlines, flashcards, and PRC legal-profession qualification exam practice.

plugins.name: legal-clinic
plugins.description: 法律诊所/法律援助：Client intake, memos, research roadmaps, deadlines, client letters, drafting, status, and handoff workflows adapted to Chinese law-school clinics, legal aid, and supervising-lawyer review.

plugins.name: legal-builder-hub
plugins.description: 技能治理中心：Skill discovery, review, install, update, and security-gate workflows adapted for WorkBuddy and a China legal-team environment.

plugins.name: ip-legal
plugins.description: 知识产权法务：Trademark, patent, copyright, trade secret, open-source, IP clause, enforcement, and portfolio workflows adapted to CNIPA, PRC courts, and Chinese platform practice.

plugins.name: cocounsel-legal
plugins.description: 中国法律检索：China-focused legal research workflow using official sources and licensed PRC legal databases when available; Westlaw/CoCounsel references are replaced by PRC research-source expectations.
